evals.prompt: Review this Dockerfile for security and best practice issues. The file is at dockerfile-analyzer-workspace/test-insecure.Dockerfile
evals.expected_output: Should identify: untagged FROM, curl|bash pipe, secrets in ENV, ADD instead of COPY, sudo usage, no USER instruction, consecutive RUNs, missing --no-install-recommends, network tools in final stage. Score should be below 50 (F grade)

evals.prompt: Can you analyze this Dockerfile and suggest improvements? The file is at dockerfile-analyzer-workspace/test-mixed.Dockerfile
evals.expected_output: Should identify: duplicate FROM alias, COPY --from numeric reference, lowercase 'run', duplicate ENTRYPOINT, duplicate CMD, legacy ENV syntax, no USER instruction, no HEALTHCHECK. Score should be in 40-65 range
